3079730.name: Cartomancy
3079730.description:
In this JRPG style team builder, uncover the mysteries unknowingly left to your name. See if you can make sense of it all and challenge the accepted reality itself.

Finding a mysterious deck of cards is one thing, but figuring out how to use them to decode an ancient cypher is another all together.

Grow crops, hunt, fish and/or gamble to manage your resources and buy equipment to aid you in your journey into the unseen.
